input: The variable is called dot e n v local. Spell that E-N-V, in caps.
ideal: The variable is called .ENV local.

input: We're migrating to Teraform. Spell that T-E-R-R-A-F-O-R-M, capitalize normally.
ideal: We're migrating to Terraform.

input: The CLI tool is called kubecuttle. Spell that K-U-B-E-C-T-L, all lowercase.
ideal: The CLI tool is called kubectl.

input: There's a new package called Esslint. Spell that E-S-L-I-N-T, all caps.
ideal: There's a new package called ESLINT.

input: It depends on the Goonicorn server. Spell that G-U-N-I-C-O-R-N, capitalize normally.
ideal: It depends on the Gunicorn server.

input: Our ORM is called Prismah. Spell that P-R-I-S-M-A, all caps.
ideal: Our ORM is called PRISMA.

input: The binary is called wazm. Spell that W-A-S-M, put it in all caps.
ideal: The binary is called WASM.

input: We use a tool called Sellinium. Spell that S-E-L-E-N-I-U-M, capitalize normally.
ideal: We use a tool called Selenium.

input: Check the tsconfig file. Spell that T-S-C-O-N-F-I-G, all lowercase.
ideal: Check the tsconfig file.

input: Notify the platform team about this. Tag platform with an at symbol. Say quote deployment is blocked end quote. Wait no, say deployment is delayed.
ideal: Notify the @platform team about this. Say "deployment is delayed."

input: Message Priya. Put an at symbol before Priya. Tell her quote the PR looks good end quote. Actually, say the PR needs changes.
ideal: Message @Priya. Tell her "the PR needs changes."

input: Let the infra team know. At symbol before infra. Say quote we're rolling back to v2 end quote. Sorry, rolling back to v3.
ideal: Let the @infra team know. Say "we're rolling back to v3."

input: Send a message to Amir. At symbol before Amir. His message should be quote sync at 2pm end quote. Wait, make that 3pm.
ideal: Send a message to @Amir. His message should be "sync at 3pm."

input: Tell the QA team about the regression. Tag QA with an at symbol. Say quote hotfix is ready for staging end quote. Actually no, ready for production.
ideal: Tell the @QA team about the regression. Say "hotfix is ready for production."

input: Reach out to DevOps. At symbol before DevOps. Their message is quote cluster is healthy end quote. Wait, scratch that, say cluster needs attention.
ideal: Reach out to @DevOps. Their message is "cluster needs attention."

input: Ping Sana. Put an at symbol before her name. Tell her quote the feature flag is live end quote. No sorry, the feature flag is disabled.
ideal: Ping @Sana. Tell her "the feature flag is disabled."

input: Let the frontend crew know. Tag frontend with at symbol. Say quote redesign ships Monday end quote. Actually, Tuesday.
ideal: Let the @frontend crew know. Say "redesign ships Tuesday."

input: The status code is two hundred. No wait, four oh three. Type that in all caps.
ideal: The status code is FOUR OH THREE.

input: The deadline is next Friday. Sorry, next Wednesday. Emphasize that.
ideal: The deadline is next **Wednesday**.

input: We should use MongoDB. Actually, Postgres. Put that in all caps.
ideal: We should use POSTGRES.

input: The root cause was a memory leak. Wait no, a race condition. Emphasize race condition.
ideal: The root cause was a **race condition**.

input: Deploy to staging first. Actually, deploy straight to prod. Make everything lowercase.
ideal: deploy straight to prod.

input: We need to refactor the auth module. Scratch that, the payments module. Emphasize payments.
ideal: We need to refactor the **payments** module.

input: The outage lasted two hours. No, three hours. Put the whole thing in caps.
ideal: THE OUTAGE LASTED THREE HOURS.

input: I'll review the diff tomorrow. Actually, tonight. Emphasize tonight.
ideal: I'll review the diff **tonight**.

input: The throughput dropped to fifty requests per second. Wait, thirty. Make that lowercase.
ideal: the throughput dropped to thirty requests per second.

input: Alert the SRE team, tag them with at symbol, about the Rediss outage, spell that R-E-D-I-S. Oh wait, it's actually an Elastic outage. Put the team name in all caps.
ideal: Alert the @SRE team about the Elastic outage.

input: uh Tell ops about the new Kuberneetees deployment. Spell that K-U-B-E-R-N-E-T-E-S, capitalize normally. Tag ops with an at symbol. And say quote rollout starts at midnight end quote. Actually, 2am.
ideal: Tell @ops about the new Kubernetes deployment. Say "rollout starts at 2am."

input: Message the data team, at symbol before data, about the Cassanda migration. Spell that C-A-S-S-A-N-D-R-A. Actually scratch that, it's a DynamoDB migration. Emphasize migration.
ideal: Message the @data team about the DynamoDB **migration**.

input: Heads up to the security team. Tag security with at symbol. We found an exploit in the Oawtch library. Spell that O-A-U-T-H, all caps. Say quote patch is critical end quote. Wait no, say patch is urgent.
ideal: Heads up to the @security team. We found an exploit in the OAUTH library. Say "patch is urgent."

input: um Notify the ML team, put an at symbol before ML, that the Pytorch training job crashed. Spell that P-Y-T-O-R-C-H, capitalize normally. The error was in the data loader. Sorry, the optimizer. Emphasize optimizer.
ideal: Notify the @ML team that the PyTorch training job crashed. The error was in the **optimizer**.

input: Write to the API team. At symbol before API. Tell them the Graffkyu-L endpoint is down. Spell that G-R-A-P-H-Q-L, all caps. Say quote investigating now end quote. No wait, say resolved, back online.
ideal: Write to the @API team. Tell them the GRAPHQL endpoint is down. Say "resolved, back online."

input: Send a note to the mobile team, tag them with an at symbol, about the Fluttr SDK update. Spell that F-L-U-T-T-E-R, capitalize normally. We need version three point ten. Actually, three point twelve. And emphasize the version number.
ideal: Send a note to the @mobile team about the Flutter SDK update. We need version **three point twelve**.

input: ah Damn it, tell the DevRel folks, at symbol before DevRel, that the Supabayce docs are wrong. Spell that S-U-P-A-B-A-S-E, capitalize normally. The endpoint returns a four oh one. Wait no, four oh three. Put the error code in caps.
ideal: Damn it, tell the @DevRel folks that the Supabase docs are wrong. The endpoint returns a FOUR OH THREE.

input: Let the cloud team know, tag cloud with an at symbol, we're moving off Haroku. Spell that H-E-R-O-K-U, capitalize normally. Actually we're moving off Render. Say quote migration starts next sprint end quote. Emphasize next sprint.
ideal: Let the @cloud team know, we're moving off Render. Say "migration starts **next sprint**."
